title: Dance Floor
lyrics: Let's turn the bedroom to the dance floor, baby, and we can get it on, yeah, yeah Let's turn the bedroom to the dance floor, and we can get it on Let's get along, let's get along, let's get along, so we can get it on Let's turn the bedroom to the dance floor, and, you know, we can get it on Let's turn the bedroom to the dance floor, I can see your move, and, girl, I like the way that you move You like the way that I groove, so let's just get it on Uh-huh, let's get it on, let's get it on, let's get it, we can get it on Let's turn the bedroom to the dance floor, let's turn the bedroom to the dance floor, and get it on Let's get it on, let's get it on, baby, we can get it on, so we can just get it on Let's hit the dance floor, let me see your moves, you know I've been at you, let's do the toe-to-toe We don't need to go out tonight, let's stay here, we'll make it all right We'll turn the music up, let's start the wheel, let's run, in this bedroom, baby, we'll create our own Baby, if I love you, then you love me, then what are we fighting for, let's get it on If I love you, and you love me, then what are we fighting for, let's just get it on, let's get it on Baby girl, let's get it on, let's hit that bedroom and turn it to the dance floor So you and I can cut a rug, let's get in bed, and make some love, let's get it on We can get it on, let's get it on, turn the bedroom to the dance floor, and let's get it on, we can get it on Let me see you work that girl, let me see you work that girl, when we see you work that girl Drop it down, let me rock right there, doing it like that, like right there girl Spin around, now touch the ground, and you and I can't go and get down But let's get it on, let's get it on, right there, do it for your daddy Right there baby, do it for your daddy You know we can go all night long, right back in the day, when you first met
